name: triads-key-spelling
note: S-TRIADS-SPELLING (operator UAT 2026-07-10): the Triads & Inversions page spells chord/note names by FUNCTION inside the stated key (regime B) - F major's IV reads Bb, never A#, and the key CHIPS carry preferred key names so the tapped chip and the cycle it opens agree (operator burst: 'c# selected, Db displays'). Asserts by shape so it survives copy changes.

steps.label: F major heading names IV as Bb
no A# anywhere in the rendered F-major cycle
triad note prose spells Bb (fretboard names in key)
key chips show preferred names (Db/Eb/Ab/Bb/F# present, no sharp-only C#/D#/G#/A# chips)
tapping the Db chip opens a Db-labeled cycle (chip and heading agree)
